name: Henan Longxiang Electrical Co., Ltd.

description: Henan Longxiang Electrical Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in the R&D, production, and sales of power transmission and distribution equipment.
aboutIntro: Founded in 2003 and listed on the NEEQ, Longxiang Electrical provides intelligent, low-carbon power equipment for global power distribution projects.
aboutDetail: With modern manufacturing bases, long-term research partnerships, and a broad transformer product portfolio, Longxiang Electrical supports utilities, industrial projects, renewable energy systems, and international engineering partners.
footerText: Providing intelligent, low-carbon power equipment and cultivating excellent professional electrical talent since 2003.
